object.name: BotCommand
object.description: This object represents a bot command.
object.rst_description: This object represents a bot command.

annotations.description: Text of the command; 1-32 characters. Can contain only lowercase English letters, digits and underscores.
annotations.html_description: Text of the command; 1-32 characters. Can contain only lowercase English letters, digits and underscores.
annotations.rst_description: Text of the command; 1-32 characters. Can contain only lowercase English letters, digits and underscores.
annotations.name: command

annotations.description: True, if the command sends an ephemeral message, which can be seen only by the sender of the message and the bot
annotations.html_description: Optional. True, if the command sends an ephemeral message, which can be seen only by the sender of the message and the bot
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. :code:`True`, if the command sends an ephemeral message, which can be seen only by the sender of the message and the bot
annotations.name: is_ephemeral
